kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your gutter cleaning business flowing smoothly. Ready to manage your routes and book more jobs?

quickActions.label: Schedule a cleaning
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new gutter cleaning job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for gutter cleaning.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What gutter cleaning jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a gutter cleaning business. You help manage cleaning schedules, coordinate crews, handle estimates based on home size and gutter linear footage, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We keep your gutters clean and your home protected. Are you looking to schedule a gutter cleaning or get a quote?
commonReasons: Get a quote for gutter cleaning

steps.title: Name your gutter cleaning business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your crews operate.

steps.title: Add your gutter services
steps.body: List the services you offer: gutter cleaning, downspout flushing, gutter guard installation, minor repairs, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing by linear footage, home size, or number of stories.

steps.title: Add your crew
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign routes and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your gutter cleaning business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a gutter cleaning business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage gutter cleaning jobs
Create estimates based on home size and gutter linear footage
Coordinate crew assignments and daily routes
Track seasonal demand and recurring client schedules
Send automated appointment reminders to clients
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Analyze revenue by property type and service level
